title: Asterisk CDR Mean Opinion Score Distribution and Tail Risk
app: Custom TA, HEC, or Universal Forwarder mapping Asterisk logs to `asterisk:pjsip`, `asterisk:cdr`, `asterisk:queue_log`, `asterisk:full`, `asterisk:messages`, `asterisk:security`, `asterisk:ami`
spl:
index=voip sourcetype="asterisk:cdr" earliest=-7d
| eval mos=tonumber(coalesce(rtp_mos, MOS, mos_score, userfield_mos, ""))
| where isnotnull(mos) AND mos>0
| bin mos span=0.25
| stats count by mos
| eventstats sum(count) as total
| eval pct=round(100*count/total,2)
description: MOS summarizes perceived voice quality. A widening left tail flags WAN jitter, one-way audio precursors, or transcoding before executives complain.
value: Supports trunk SLAs, guides codec policy, and documents improvements after QoS work.
implementation: (1) Populate MOS from RTP QoS or SBC export. (2) Alias to `rtp_mos`. (3) Histogram dashboard with SLA line. (4) Alert on p90 MOS drop week over week.
grandmaExplanation: We chart call clarity so bad quality shows up as data, not only angry tickets.
